name: Mcginn Bus Co
registry_source: Massachusetts Secretary of the Commonwealth Corporations Division (corp.sec.state.ma.us) - not directly retrieved; historical corporate records indicate 1922 incorporation as Plymouth & Brockton Street Railway Co. after asset sale of predecessor Brockton & Plymouth Street Railway Co.
notes: Input name 'Mcginn Bus Co' at 8 Industrial Park Rd, Plymouth, MA matches FMCSA carrier 'PLYMOUTH AND BROCKTON STREET RAILWAY CO' (USDOT 52854) at that exact address. McGinn Bus Company Inc (USDOT 18432, Lynn, MA) is the affiliated parent/family company - both are under common ownership (McGinn family) operating since 1888 with Plymouth & Brockton incorporated 1922. The Plymouth address belongs to the P&B subsidiary, not McGinn Bus Company Inc itself. Safety rating Satisfactory as of 08/06/2024 compliance review. Returning P&B record as best match to address; if user wanted parent McGinn Bus Company Inc, USDOT is 18432 (15 power units, 20 drivers, Lynn MA, MC-1255, Satisfactory 5/16/2024, founded 1918/1888).

name: Drogin Bus Co
registry_source: New Jersey Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services Business Records (njportal.com) - not directly retrievable via WebFetch; no Drogin Bus entity found in public name searches.
notes: No FMCSA SAFER carrier match for 'DROGIN' (search returned 0 records). No carrier at '53 Kennedy Blvd, Bayonne, NJ' in SAFER. Historical context: Drogin family operated Boulevard Transit Lines from the 1930s, ran NJ-Staten Island routes (99, 99S, 122, 144 lines), and went out of business in late 1990s/early 2000-2001 (operations absorbed by Coach USA/Red and Tan). The 'Drogin Bus Company' listing at 53 Kennedy Blvd Bayonne (phone 212-425-6878) at hub.biz appears to be a stale directory entry. Likely defunct; if any successor entity exists it does not hold a USDOT number or NJ SOS record under the Drogin name. Low confidence - entity appears inactive/defunct.
